description: After building a pallet for a large retail customer, the operator must generate and apply a Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC) label for compliance.

nodes.task_description: After a pallet is fully picked, scan the pallet ID to begin the labeling process.

expected_outcome.value: The system retrieves the contents of the scanned pallet.

nodes.task_description: Generate a unique SSCC number for the pallet.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a new, unique SSCC barcode.

nodes.task_description: Print the SSCC label in the customer-specified format and apply it to the pallet.

expected_outcome.value: A compliant GS1-128 label is printed and applied.
